cards.awaitingHint: Invitees who haven't entered the app yet

empty.title: No invitations sent yet
empty.description: Import an Excel with parents and students — invitations are generated automatically from there.

importParents.title: Import parents
importParents.subtitle: Upload an Excel or CSV with parents and their students' IDs. We generate one invitation per parent (email if available, otherwise WhatsApp). Students must exist first — import the student roster first.

dropzone.columnsHint: Columns: nombre, apellido, email, whatsapp, ids_alumnos. If a parent has several students, separate their IDs with a comma or semicolon in that cell.
dropzone.previewSummary: {valid} valid · {errors} with errors · preview of first 20

prefilled.label: Recommended:
prefilled.hint: It comes pre-filled with your students; just add each one's parent and re-upload it.

example.title: Example of a valid file
example.hint: This is what the data looks like. ids_alumnos uses each student's ID (the same one from the student importer). Phone goes in international format (+52…).

result.title: Result
result.coverageComplete: All your students ({total}) have at least one invited parent.
result.coverageMissing: You're missing {count} of {total} students with no invited parent:

CLAIMED.title: This invitation was already used
CLAIMED.body: Your account already exists. Open the Eez4us app and sign in with your email and password. If you don't remember it, use "Forgot it?" in the app.

EXPIRED.title: This invitation has expired
EXPIRED.body: Ask the school to send you a new invitation.

REVOKED.title: This invitation was revoked
REVOKED.body: Ask the school to generate a new invitation for you.

NOT_FOUND.title: Invitation not found
NOT_FOUND.body: The link is not valid. Make sure you copied it in full, or ask the school for a new one.

validation.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.

errors.PHONE_INVALID: The phone number is not valid for the school's country (prefix {prefix}).
errors.INVITATION_EXPIRED: This invitation has expired. Ask the school for a new one.
errors.SIGNUP_FAILED: We couldn't create the account. One may already exist with this email.
errors.fallback: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.

done.title: Account created!
done.subtitle: You can now coordinate pickup for {count, plural, one {your child} other {your children}} with {school}.
done.step1: Download the Eez4us app on your Android: <apk>download APK</apk> (allow "install from unknown sources" if prompted).
done.step2: Open it and sign in with the email <mono>{email}</mono> and the password you just created.
done.step3: When you head out for school pickup, tap "On my way" and you're set.

claim.intro: {school} invited you to coordinate pickup with Eez4us. Create your account to get started.
